description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a futuristic, urban appearance. The individual wears a thick, fur-lined jacket with a high collar and a prominent, patterned scarf covering the lower half of the face. The jacket features angular, armor-like segments and glowing blue accents, giving a high-tech vibe. The arms are exposed, showing muscular build and geometric tattoos or markings, while the hands are gloved. The pants are loose-fitting and tucked into high-top sneakers, with additional details such as straps and colored bands on the legs. The hairstyle is spiky and voluminous, adding to the character's dynamic and edgy look.
description: A futuristic adult pedestrian in a fur-lined jacket, patterned scarf, loose pants, and high-top sneakers, with spiky hair and glowing blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patterned scarf, fur-lined collar, glowing blue chest accents, and gloved right hand.
description_view_1: Left three-quarter view highlighting the exposed muscular arm, geometric markings, and side details of the jacket and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fur-lined hood, back armor segments, and the overall silhouette of the jacket and pants.
description_view_3: Right three-quarter view emphasizing the spiky hairstyle, side profile of the scarf, and leg strap details.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic fur-lined jacket, patterned scarf, loose pants, high-top athletic footwear, gloves
